template.name: Product Launch — Editorial Bundle
template.description: Premium 8-slide product launch bundle with a unified editorial theme: cream and ink palette, Playfair display type, full-bleed cover imagery, rounded frames, and a dark closing CTA.

scenes.title: Cover
scenes.description: Full-bleed cover image with editorial serif headline and cream content card.

clips.content: A refined launch story for your next release. Replace this copy with your product promise, audience, and launch date.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: The Problem
scenes.description: Vision-style split with serif headline, rule lines, and portrait frame.

clips.content: Teams waste time on fragmented tools, slow launches, and messaging that never feels premium. Your product deserves a clearer story.
Replace with your customer pain points.

scenes.title: Before & After

clips.content: Manual workflows, scattered assets, and inconsistent brand presentation.
One polished bundle, unified theme, and launch-ready scenes in minutes.
